prestazioni: Engine swap to Toyota's 2GR-FKS 3.5L V6 (from the Lexus RC 350 F Sport) with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (10.5 psi boost), paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU tune for 450whp on E85 fuel. Upgraded fuel system includes twin Walbro 450 LPH pumps, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator.

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: KAAZ 2.5-way limited-slip differential, Toyota Racing Development (TRD) 8-speed automatic transmission cooler, and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 twin-disc clutch (if manual swap is performed). Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers, Whiteline 27mm rear sway bar, and Cusco front strut tower bar for chassis rigidity.

Forced induction supporting mods: Garrett GTX3076R turbocharger (for hybrid build), GReddy intercooler with 3.5" piping, Tomei 272° camshafts, and a custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system with Borla Pro XS mufflers and a Tial 44mm wastegate. Cooling upgrades include a Setrab 50-row oil cooler and a Mishimoto aluminum radiator with dual SPAL 16" fans.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (Venza-specific, not a generic SUV kit) with custom carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser. Painted in Toyota's 'Burning Black Crystal Shine' with a matte clear coat for depth. Front bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed unit integrating a Seibon carbon fiber hood with dual heat extractors.

Wheel setup: WORK Emotion CR Kiwami 20x10.5 +15 ET (front) and 20x11.5 +20 ET (rear) in gloss black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/20 front, 305/30/20 rear). Brake system upgraded to Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers with 400mm rotors and 4-piston rear calipers with 360mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads.

Interior overhaul: Recaro Pole Position seats (heated/ventilated) with custom Alcantara upholstery in 'Nero Black' and red stitching. Full roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Dashboard replaced with a carbon fiber unit housing a 12.3" AIM MXS Strada digital dash and a custom center console integrating a RaceLogic VBOX Sport data logger.
